title: Assume, Then Project
prompt: A sphinx bars the room. Complete its proof to banish it.
help: This room holds 2 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) implication_intro(A ∧ B, A) then hp := A ∧ B ⊢ A; by and_left(A, B) then ⊢ A ∧ B; by hp;. (2) contrapositive(A, B) then ⊢ ¬B ⇒ ¬A; by nn;.
